name: Avilon
description: Premium Roblox UI library with modern design. Includes Window, Tab, SubPage, Section, Button, Toggle, Slider, Dropdown, Colorpicker, Keybind, Label, and Textbox widgets.

apiSignature.Slider: Section:Slider({Name, Flag, Min, Max, Default, Suffix, Decimals, Callback})
apiSignature.Dropdown: Section:Dropdown({Name, Flag, Items, Default, MaxSize, Multi, Callback})
apiSignature.Keybind: Section:Keybind or Label:Keybind({Flag, Mode, Default, Callback})
apiSignature.Label: Section:Label({Name})
apiSignature.Textbox: Section:Textbox({Name, Flag, Default, Placeholder, Finished, Numeric, Callback})
